# isTransferring

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value indicating whether the file is still being transferred.

## Declaration

```swift
var isTransferring: Bool { get }
```

## Discussion

The value of this property is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the file transfer is not yet complete or [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false] if the transfer is complete.

## Managing the File Transfer

- **progress**: An object that tracks the progress of the file transfer.
- **cancel()**: Cancels the file transfer.
